run_metadata.coverage_summary: Tier 1 government portals swept via search (AusTender, buy.nsw/NSW eTendering, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA/SA/Tas/NT). Tier 2 GBEs and health touched (HealthShare NSW, Ausgrid, TasNetworks, water corporations). Tier 3 corporate/e-sourcing checked (SAP Ariba Discovery, NBN Co, Australia Post, Transgrid) but no publicly-visible corporate RFx was captured - all were registration- or invitation-gated. Primary constraint this run: the environment's outbound egress returns HTTP 403 on direct WebFetch of every major AU tender portal (AusTender detail pages, buy.nsw, tenders.vic, qld2032), so opportunity detail was extracted from search-result snippets rather than the tender detail pages/documents. As a result most captured tenders are at headline level and still need a full deliverables pass. One genuinely new source found: Procurement Australia (national group-buying organisation running its own tenders).
gaps: AusTender: main /atm list and every /Atm/Show/<uuid> detail page returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch (WAF block on datacenter egress); detail limited to search snippets. New-looking ATMs seen but not opened: RFI_ATM_2026_6026, GA2026/564, MSD/RFT/55619/1, PR10031930-RASS. ATM_2026_6339 (Host Broadcaster Services, DCCEEW) checked but had already closed 09-Jun-2026, excluded.
buy.nsw / NSW eTendering: opportunity search pages returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch; captured items rely on search snippets. Detail/documents not opened.
Buying for Victoria (tenders.vic.gov.au /tenders/new): HTTP 403 to WebFetch; no Victorian opportunity captured this run - deferred to next run.
QTenders (qtenders.epw.qld.gov.au) and qld2032 mirror: HTTP 403 to WebFetch; QLD education refurbishment tenders captured at headline level from snippets, closing dates and documents not confirmed.
SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery: no publicly-visible Australian RFx surfaced without login; portal recorded in discovered_sources only. No corporate tender fabricated.
Tenders WA, Tenders SA, NT QTOL, ACT Tenders: only lightly searched this run, no new open opportunity confirmed; rotate for deeper coverage next run.

Corporate/major-buyer portals (NBN Co, Australia Post, BHP, Rio Tinto, Woolworths, Coles, Qantas, banks, telcos): opportunities are registration-gated (Ariba/Coupa) or invitation-only; recorded as sources where relevant, none captured as tenders.

NSW Public Works Sustainable Energy Infrastructure EOI and Ausgrid BESS packages were surfaced via aggregator/search signal only; the buyer-originated portal listing (buy.nsw / Ausgrid e-tendering) could not be opened due to 403, so both remain pending buyer-source verification.
recommended_seed_additions: Procurement Australia - E-Tendering portal (portal.tenderlink.com/procurementaustralia) - national group-buying / aggregated-demand organisation that runs its own public RFTs on behalf of member councils and agencies; buyer-originated collective procurement, not a paid reseller.

tenders.title: Supply of Natural Gas to large public hospitals in NSW
tenders.description: HealthShare NSW is seeking tenders for the supply of natural gas to large public hospitals across NSW.
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering
tenders.delivery_location: New South Wales (large public hospital sites)
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering health-portal search for recently published NSW RFTs; buyer-originated (HealthShare NSW on the NSW Government portal).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. Detail page and tender documents not opened because buy.nsw returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch from this environment; closing date/time confirmed from search snippet. Value, term, deliverables and contact still to be extracted on a future authenticated/unblocked run.

tenders.title: MURRUMBA SSC - Block I&P Refurbishment
tenders.description: Queensland Department of Education invites tenders for the refurbishment of Block I&P at Murrumba State Secondary College.
tenders.reasoning: Found via QTenders directory and qld2032 QTenders mirror (data sourced from the QLD Dept of Housing & Public Works QTenders system); buyer-originated (QLD Dept of Education).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. QTenders detail page returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch; closing date, value and documents not yet confirmed. Contact name from search snippet.

tenders.title: Pimlico SHS - Refurbishment of Science Lab (Block E, Room 15)
tenders.description: Queensland Department of Education invites tenders for the refurbishment of a science laboratory (Block E, Room 15) at Pimlico State High School.
tenders.delivery_location: Pimlico State High School, 55-77 Fulham Road, Pimlico QLD
tenders.reasoning: Found via QTenders directory and qld2032 QTenders mirror (data sourced directly from the QLD QTenders system); buyer-originated (QLD Dept of Education).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. QTenders detail page returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch; closing date, value and documents not yet confirmed. Delivery address from search snippet.

tenders.title: Sustainable Energy Infrastructure Providers NSW (EOI)
tenders.description: NSW Public Works is inviting expressions of interest from organisations to deliver a multi-year Sustainability Program (2026-2028) comprising multiple solar and energy-efficiency upgrade projects across priority NSW government-operated facilities.
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced as a discovery signal in search results (aggregator listing australiantenders.com.au #605503); buyer-originated source is buy.nsw / NSW eTendering (NSW Public Works). Buyer-portal listing could not be opened to confirm reference and dates.
tenders.notes: PENDING buyer-source verification. Captured from aggregator/search signal only because buy.nsw returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch; tender reference, closing date, value and documents not yet confirmed on the buyer portal. Not treated as a confirmed, fully-verified opportunity - flagged in run_metadata.gaps.

tenders.title: Battery Energy Storage Solutions (BESS) equipment packages
tenders.description: Ausgrid has tender opportunities for the supply of Battery Energy Storage Solutions (BESS) equipment - including ~5 MW BESS packages capable of connecting at 11 kV for community battery sites, plus larger-scale BESS equipment (Tranche 2).
tenders.delivery_location: Ausgrid network area, New South Wales
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced as a discovery signal in search results referencing Ausgrid BESS tender packages; buyer-originated source is Ausgrid's own e-tendering (TenderLink) portal. Ausgrid is a NSW government-owned electricity distribution GBE.
tenders.notes: PENDING buyer-source verification. Captured from search signal only; Ausgrid's e-tendering portal is registration-gated and was not opened, so reference IDs, closing dates and documents are unconfirmed. Not treated as a fully-verified opportunity - flagged in run_metadata.gaps.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Appeared in a search for Australian council/eProcurement platforms. Procurement Australia is a national group-buying / aggregated-demand organisation that runs its own public RFTs (e.g. road signs & lighting, PPE/workwear, insurance broking & risk services) on behalf of member councils and agencies - i.e. buyer-originated collective procurement, not a paid reseller re-publishing others' notices. Free supplier registration; download docs and lodge responses via a secure eTender box.
discovered_sources.notes: New to this routine. Publishes on the TenderLink platform but Procurement Australia is itself the contracting/aggregating buyer, so it qualifies as buyer-originated. Public tender list at portal.tenderlink.com/procurementaustralia.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Queried for recently published NSW Health / HealthShare RFTs; source already known to routine.
discovered_sources.notes: HealthShare NSW natural gas RFT (HSSP_HC26_C676) captured from this channel. Direct fetch of buy.nsw returned HTTP 403 this run.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Queried for QLD Department of Education refurbishment tenders; source already known. Note the active domain qtenders.epw.qld.gov.au (also seen as qtenders.hpw.qld.gov.au).
discovered_sources.notes: QED 6353 and QED 6332 education refurbishment RFTs captured. Detail pages returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch this run.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Queried for GBE energy/network tenders; source already known. Surfaced Ausgrid BESS equipment packages.
discovered_sources.notes: Registration-gated e-tendering; individual opportunities not opened this run.

discovered_sources.source_name: SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Mandatory Tier 3 check. Public posting board for corporate RFx; full detail requires a (free) supplier account.
discovered_sources.notes: No publicly-visible Australian RFx surfaced without login this run. Recorded so the corporate source set stays complete; no corporate tender fabricated.
